title: Glass Heart
description: A difficult mod that sets your max health to 1 heart.
body:
A difficult mod that sets max health to 1 heart. Everything is much riskier, and any damage could be fatal... Good luck.

The name and concept of this mod is inspired by the [Hollow Knight mod](https://www.moddb.com/mods/hollow-knight-glass-soul/downloads/hollow-knight-glass-soul-download) by a similar name

**READ BEFORE USE**

Version 1.20.1 is FORGE, and will be the only forge version, so don't bother asking for an update.

1.20.1 requires the mod to be CLIENT and SERVER, whereas all the other ones only need to be on the SERVER



**Health can be configured**, for those of you who find it too hard

Setting it to 0 or less will set it to 1

To change max health, execute one of the following commands:

Singleplayer, Cheats disabled:
```
/setmaxhpsingleplayer <value>
```
**BE WARNED!** In a LAN world, people without cheats will still be able to toggle this value.

Anywhere, Cheats enabled:
```
/setmaxhp <value>
```

A Fabric, Paper, Datapack, and Spigot version are planned to release, but for now don't exist

**Other Site versions:**

I would personally recommend Modrinth, as it is easier to use, but this mod is still available on Curseforge.

**CurseForge Version**

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glass-heart](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glass-heart)

**THE CURSEFORGE VERSION WAS CODED DIFFERENTLY, AND THEREFORE WILL NOT WORK THE SAME WAY! SPECIFICLALLY, IT IS NEEDED CLIENT AND SERVERSIDE**

**Modrinth Version**
You're already here, but here's the link anyway:

[https://modrinth.com/mod/glass-heart](https://modrinth.com/mod/glass-heart/settings/description)



**Credits**

Developer of *[Glass Soul](https://www.moddb.com/mods/hollow-knight-glass-soul/downloads/hollow-knight-glass-soul-download)* (Concept and Name)

Developer of *[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)* (1.20.1 version, and help with Coding Concepts)
